master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Olho de Sirius”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside Observatório Serra Alta, a remote mountain-top astronomical observatory, on a stormy night when a renowned astronomer is found dead at the foot of the great telescope. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Observatório Serra Alta is an isolated mountaintop observatory with a great silver equatorial telescope under a rotating metal dome, a spiral iron staircase, scientific control consoles, paper observation ledgers, archival data boxes, a basement data-processing lab with humming server racks, and a modest residential wing with a kitchen; the mountain is wrapped in a heavy nighttime storm. Color palette: deep night blue #14213D, storm indigo #1B2A4A, aged copper #B5651D, polished brass #C49A4A, oxidized green #3A5A47, slate gray shadows #3A3A3D, chalk-white star-chart lines #EDE6D3, dim amber console light #C68A3E, cold telescope-steel #6B7280. Lighting: cold blue storm light from outside, dim amber instrument and desk lamps inside, dramatic contrast between the warm brass of the telescope mount and the cold blue storm darkness, soft golden reflections on polished metal, subtle film grain. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: telescope tubes, equatorial mounts, brass counterweights, gear wheels, star charts, photometric light curves on graph paper, printed log files, server racks, archival boxes labeled by year, coffee cups, handwritten notebooks. Avoid horror, gore, blood spatter, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “O Olho de Sirius”. Show the interior of the great dome at Observatório Serra Alta at night during a mountain storm. The main focus is the giant equatorial telescope at the center: a long inclined steel tube on a brass equatorial mount, with a heavy polished brass counterweight hanging from a rod at the end of the declination axis. At the base of the mount, on the dark rubber floor, a fallen man's silhouette suggests a body without gore — a shape in pajamas lying still at the foot of the mount. Above, a narrow slit in the rotating dome is open to a stormy, starless night sky with no visible stars due to cloud cover. Around the dome: a spiral iron staircase rising to the observing floor, scientific control consoles with dim amber lights, paper star charts pinned to a pillar, and a single brass lamp casting a cold pool of light. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the telescope and the fallen figure slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the cold blue storm light against the warm brass of the mount to create drama and depth. Mood: refined, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, somber, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “O Olho de Sirius”. Show the polished brass counterweight of the great equatorial telescope hanging at the end of a steel rod, dominating the frame. A thin dark vertical streak on the lower edge of the brass hints at a dried trace, the central mystery detail, while most of the surface shines cleanly as if recently wiped. Behind it, softly blurred, the inclined steel tube of the telescope and the cold blue slit of the open dome against the stormy night. Composition: square close-up still life, the brass counterweight is the clear focal point, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the warm polished brass and the cold blue darkness. The counterweight should remain instantly readable as an object of scientific weight that hides something, even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary, somber.

cupula.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Cúpula do telescópio”, the central crime scene at Observatório Serra Alta. Show the great silver equatorial telescope at the center of a circular metal-walled dome, its inclined tube pointing up toward a narrow open slit in the rotating dome that reveals a stormy, starless night sky. The brass counterweight hangs from the declination axis rod. On the dark rubber floor at the base of the mount, a fallen shape in pajamas suggests the body of an older man without gore or blood spatter. A spiral iron staircase curves up to the observing floor on the right. Around the dome: a control console with dim amber lights, a paper star chart pinned to a pillar, and a single brass lamp casting a cold pool of light over the scene. Composition: the telescope and the fallen figure are the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding dome context to establish the location. Mood: quiet, suspicious, somber, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: open dome slit, brass counterweight on its rod, fallen figure at the base of the mount, spiral iron staircase, control console, dim amber lamp.

escritorio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Escritório dos astrônomos” at Observatório Serra Alta. Show a second-floor office with a wall of windows looking out into the dark stormy valley. There are wooden work desks with observation clipboards, a switched-on computer with a locked screen, and a low bookshelf with gray archival boxes labeled by year (one clearly marked 'SIRIUS-9 / 2021'). On one desk lie printed pages and an open black notebook with recent pen notes. A single desk lamp casts warm amber light over the pages while the rest of the room fades into blue storm shadow. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the desk, the open notebook, the printed pages, and the labeled archival box all visible enough to function as clues, but not overly dramatic. Mood: orderly, scholarly, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: open notebook, printed retraction pages, labeled archival box, locked computer, observation clipboards.

laboratorio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Laboratório de processamento de dados” in the basement of Observatório Serra Alta. Show a cold, humming basement room with two tall server racks glowing with small status LEDs, three workstations with monitors, an external hard drive on a bench, and a cork board on the wall with colored tags marking time-slot reservations. One of the monitors shows a recently closed but still glowing session. Cold blue server light mixes with the dim amber of a desk lamp. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the room as a data-processing lab, with the cork board and the lit monitor noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: clinical, quiet, technical, quietly suspicious, cold. Important visual clues: server racks, lit monitor with closed session, cork board with reservation tags, external hard drive.

sala_hospedagem.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Corredor da hospedagem” at Observatório Serra Alta. Show a residential corridor of bedroom doors for visitors and the live-in housekeeper, with a wooden floor that creaks with storm humidity. Beside the door, an electronic access panel on the wall displays a chronological list of credentials and timestamps for restricted areas. A single dim wall sconce lights the corridor in warm amber, while storm-blue shadow presses in from the windows at the far end. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot of the corridor, with the electronic access panel clearly readable as the key clue on the side wall. Mood: domestic, quiet, restrained, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: electronic access panel with credential list, bedroom doors, creaking wooden floor, dim wall sconce.

oficina.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Oficina da garagem” at Observatório Serra Alta, located beside the kitchen at ground level. Show a maintenance workshop with a sturdy workbench covered in tools: wrenches, a vice, grease rags, and labeled drawers of spare parts. On the bench, a large disassembled metal gear wheel from the dome mechanism rests on a cloth with fresh grease, and folded printed expense sheets sit at the foot of the gear. A single hanging workshop lamp casts warm amber light over the bench while the rest of the workshop stays in blue-gray shadow. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the workshop, with the greasy gear wheel and the folded expense sheets noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: practical, greasy, grounded, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: disassembled dome gear wheel with fresh grease, folded expense sheets, labeled drawers, workshop tools, hanging lamp.

contrapeso_latao.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Contrapeso da montagem equatorial”, the central clue in the mystery. Show a heavy polished brass counterweight, cylindrical and gleaming, hanging at the end of a steel rod of the equatorial telescope mount. Most of the brass surface shines cleanly as if recently wiped, but along the lower edge a thin dark vertical streak — a dried trace — remains clearly visible against the polished metal, the central mystery detail. The cold blue darkness of the dome and the blurred steel tube of the telescope fill the background. Composition: close-up still life, the brass counterweight dominates the frame, with the steel rod, the polished metal texture, and the thin dark streak clearly readable. Mood: intimate, suspicious, weighted, elegant, quiet, important.

oculos_otavio.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Óculos de Otávio”. Show a pair of thin-framed reading glasses resting folded on top of a metal control box of the telescope, several steps away from where the body lies. The glasses are intact and carefully placed rather than dropped, which subtly reads as out of place in a fall scene. Around them, the dim amber reflection of a brass lamp and the blurred steel of the telescope mount. Composition: square close-up still life, the intact glasses are the clear focal point, with realistic metal and lens texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ordinary but important, investigative, somber.

caderno_otavio.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caderno de anotações de Otávio”. Show a black-covered notebook lying open on a wooden desk, with dense recent handwritten pen notes comparing observation logs. The word 'inconsistência' appears several times in the margins alongside dated entries and small drawn light-curve graphs. A pen rests across the page, and printed pages peek from underneath. A single warm desk lamp lights the page, leaving the rest of the desk in soft shadow. Composition: square close-up still life, the open notebook is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, calm, investigative, scholarly, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: open notebook, handwritten 'inconsistência' notes, light-curve sketches, pen, printed pages underneath.

rascunho_retratacao.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Rascunho de retratação”. Show three printed pages partly covered by the black notebook, with red pen marks circling a co-author's name in the header and crossing out lines about the Sirius-9 exoplanet detection. The pages clearly read as a scientific retraction draft without needing legible small text. A red pen lies across the top page, and the desk lamp casts warm amber light across the paper. Composition: square close-up still life, the marked retraction pages are the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and visible red pen annotations. Mood: quiet, suspicious, scholarly, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: printed retraction pages, red pen marks, circled co-author name, desk lamp.

caixa_sirius.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caixa-arquivo Sirius-9”. Show an open gray archival box labeled 'SIRIUS-9 / CAMPANHA 2021' on a low bookshelf, with printed log sheets and external data discs visible inside. The dates on some sheets clearly do not match the labels on the discs, a subtle inconsistency that reads as the clue. A magnifying glass and a desk-lamp reflection fall across the open contents. Composition: close-up still life, the open labeled archival box dominates the frame, with realistic cardboard, paper, and disc texture and visible date mismatches. Mood: quiet, suspicious, archival, investigative, weighty. Important visual clues: gray archival box, SIRIUS-9 label, mismatched dates on logs and discs, data discs, printed sheets.

servidor_logs.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Terminal do servidor de logs”. Show a computer monitor in the basement lab displaying a chronological server log of user sessions, with one line clearly highlighting an active overnight session for the user 'lucas.phd' running continuous photometric processing. The cold blue glow of the screen lights the keyboard and the edge of a server rack. Composition: square close-up still life, the log-monitor is the clear focal point, with legible session entries and cold screen light. Mood: clinical, quiet, technical, investigative, suspicious. Important visual clues: monitor with session log, 'lucas.phd' active session, timestamps, server rack edge.

quadro_horarios.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Quadro de horários do laboratório”. Show a cork board on the basement lab wall with colored paper tags marking workstation reservations by day and time, arranged in a grid. One tag clearly reserves a station for 'Helena' on the storm night, while the slot remains empty in the server records beside it. Pushpins and small handwritten labels complete the board. A desk lamp casts warm amber light across the cork. Composition: square close-up still life, the reservation cork board is the clear focal point, with legible tags and grid layout. Mood: orderly, quiet, technical, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: cork board, reservation tags, Helena's storm-night tag, grid layout, pushpins.

painel_acessos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Painel eletrônico de acessos”. Show an electronic access panel mounted on the corridor wall beside the residential doors, with a small glowing screen displaying a chronological list of credential entries to restricted areas. Two entries clearly show a credential 'h.mariani' accessing the dome staircase at 03:47 and again at 04:12 during the storm night, while a third shows no movement for 'ingrid'. Small status LEDs glow green and amber beside the screen. Composition: close-up still life, the access panel and its glowing credential list are the clear focal point, with legible timestamps. Mood: quiet, technical, suspicious, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: electronic access panel, 'h.mariani' dome entries at 03:47 and 04:12, no movement for 'ingrid', status LEDs.

engrenagem_cupula.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Engrenagem da cúpula”. Show a large disassembled metal gear wheel from the dome rotation mechanism resting on a cloth on the workshop bench, smeared with fresh dark grease and surrounded by wrenches and a vice. The fresh grease clearly reads as someone having worked on it recently. Composition: square close-up still life, the greasy gear wheel is the clear focal point, with realistic metal and grease texture and surrounding workshop tools. Mood: practical, grounded, greasy, quietly investigative, ordinary but important.

planilha_despesas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Planilha de despesas do observatório”. Show folded printed expense sheets resting at the foot of the greasy gear wheel on the workshop bench, with handwritten pen marks circling a name 'Tomé' and the word 'cobrar' written beside overdue technician salary lines. A pen rests across the folded sheets. Composition: square close-up still life, the folded expense sheets with the circled name are the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and legible handwriting. Mood: quiet, grounded, quietly suspicious, ordinary but important. Important visual clues: folded expense sheets, circled name 'Tomé', handwritten 'cobrar', overdue salary lines, pen.

helena.prompt: Create a character portrait for Helena, co-director of Observatório Serra Alta and co-author of the Sirius-9 discovery. Helena is a Brazilian White woman in her early 50s, fair skin with subtle freckling and early wrinkles, sharp cheekbones, chin-length straight ash-blonde hair streaked with gray, and pale hazel eyes behind thin rectangular reading glasses. She is intelligent, controlled, and ambitious; she wants to protect a reputation built over twenty years. Appearance: a tailored charcoal-gray blazer over a dark blouse, a thin gold chain, a small lapel pin of an observatory logo, and a wristwatch. Her expression is measured, serious, guarded, composed under pressure, with a faint tension around the eyes. The sleeve of her blazer has slipped just enough to suggest a mark on her left forearm without showing it clearly. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the observatory office softly blurred behind her, with brass details, star charts, and cold blue storm light on one side of her face. She should look human, believable, intellectually formidable, and morally complex rather than obviously villainous. Mood: restrained authority, intellectual control, quiet defensiveness, hidden guilt.

tome.prompt: Create a character portrait for Tomé, the maintenance technician at Observatório Serra Alta and Otávio's estranged son. Tomé is a Brazilian Pardo (mixed-race) man in his late 20s, warm tan skin, strong jaw, short curly dark brown hair, a patchy short beard, and a small scar through his left eyebrow. He is practical, hurt, and proud, carrying an old resentment toward his father. Appearance: a faded blue work overalls jacket over a gray henley shirt with the sleeves rolled up, grease-stained fingers, a lanyard with an access badge, and a small screwdriver tucked behind one ear. His expression is direct, guarded, a little defiant, tired from an overnight shift, but cooperative rather than hostile. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the greasy workshop with tools and a gear wheel softly blurred behind him, with warm amber work-lamp light and blue storm shadow. He should look human, grounded, believable, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and build from every other character. Mood: practical resentment, tired honesty, reluctant cooperation, hidden hurt.

ingrid.prompt: Create a character portrait for Ingrid, a visiting researcher and the observatory's principal private donor. Ingrid is a Brazilian Afro-descendant woman in her late 40s, deep brown skin, high cheekbones, natural coily black hair pulled back in a neat bun, and dark brown eyes. She is businesslike, articulate, and accustomed to buying influence with funding. Appearance: an elegant deep-emerald wrap dress under a structured black coat, a statement gold necklace, small gold hoop earrings, a designer wristwatch, and a leather portfolio tucked under one arm. Her expression is composed, cool, executive, with a raised chin and an appraising gaze. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the corridor of the residential wing softly blurred behind her, with a dim wall sconce and cold blue storm light at the window. She should look sophisticated, believable, financially powerful, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and style from every other character. Mood: executive composure, cool control, restrained defensiveness, financial authority.

lucas.prompt: Create a character portrait for Lucas, an astronomy PhD student in his final year, supervised by Otávio. Lucas is a Brazilian East-Asian-descended (Japanese-Brazilian) man in his late 20s, light tan skin, straight black hair slightly tousled, narrow dark eyes behind round wire-frame glasses, and a thin serious mouth. He is brilliant, anxious, and insecure, fearing his thesis depends on data that may be retracted. Appearance: a rumpled olive-green corduroy jacket over a faded band t-shirt, a messenger bag strap across the chest, a wristwatch, and a pen clipped to the jacket pocket. His expression is worried, earnest, nervously alert, with dark circles under the eyes from an overnight session. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the basement data-processing lab with server racks softly blurred behind him, with cold blue server light and a dim amber desk lamp. He should look young, bookish, anxious, believable, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and build from every other character. Mood: anxious brilliance, academic worry, earnest cooperation, hidden fear.

cleusa.prompt: Create a character portrait for Cleusa, the housekeeper and cook who has lived at Observatório Serra Alta for fifteen years and found the body. Cleusa is a Brazilian woman of mature years, in her early 60s, medium-brown Mestiza skin with deep laugh lines, warm dark brown eyes, and silver-streaked dark hair pulled back in a practical bun under a headscarf. She is observant, kind, and practical, and notices what no one else does. Appearance: a simple navy-blue house dress with a white apron, a folded cloth over one arm, a small cross on a thin chain, and a ring of keys at her waist. Her expression is compassionate, shaken but composed, watchful, with a quiet sorrow for the dead astronomer. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the observatory kitchen with copper pots and a coffee pot softly blurred behind her, with warm amber stove light and cold blue storm light from a window. She should look warm, grounded, believable, maternal, and clearly distinct in age, ethnicity, and role from every other character. Mood: compassionate observation, quiet shock, practical kindness, watchful neutrality.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “O Olho de Sirius”. Show the great dome of Observatório Serra Alta after the mystery is resolved, now under a clear starry night sky after the storm has passed. The dome slit is open and this time the sky is full of stars, with the trail of comet Iris streaking across the upper portion of the frame. Inside the dome, the brass counterweight and the equatorial mount stand calm and clean, no longer a crime scene, and a closed archival box labeled 'SIRIUS-9' sits on the observing floor, symbolizing the fraud that was uncovered. The telescope is pointed up at the comet. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the open dome, the starry sky with the comet, the cleaned brass mount, and the closed Sirius-9 box as symbols of resolution and painful truth. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary, somber hope.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “O Olho de Sirius”. Show the great dome of Observatório Serra Alta still wrapped in the tail of the storm, with the dome slit half open to a mostly clouded sky through which only a few stars peek. The brass counterweight and the equatorial mount remain in shadow, half lit by a single dim lamp, and the archival box labeled 'SIRIUS-9' is visible but only partly in the light, as if the truth was only half uncovered. The fallen figure is gone but a dark smudge remains on the rubber floor at the base of the mount. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the half-lit telescope mount and the half-open slit, with deeper shadows around the frame and a partly revealed archival box. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort, somber.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “O Olho de Sirius”. Show the great dome of Observatório Serra Alta after the storm has passed and the wrong conclusion has been accepted. The dome slit is open but pointed at an empty patch of sky where no comet is visible, the telescope aimed at nothing. The brass counterweight gleams undisturbed, the archival box labeled 'SIRIUS-9' is closed and pushed to the back of a shelf, and a single open notebook on a desk nearby has its retraction page turned face-down, as if the truth was deliberately set aside. The atmosphere is warm but heavy with shadow, suggesting that the guilty party walked away into a calm, indifferent night. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the empty-patched sky in the slit, the undisturbed brass mount, the closed Sirius-9 box, and the face-down notebook. No characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary, somber indifference.
